// HEADS UPThe 30% federal solar tax credit ended this year for new systems. Indiana net metering, Illinois Shines SREC, USDA REAP grants and utility rebates are still active — and equipment pricing is down. We'll walk you through today's real numbers.
// MOUNTING OPTIONS

Wherever the sun lands, we build there.

Plenty of customers come to us thinking solar = roof only. The truth is roughly half of our installs are ground mounts — better orientation, easier maintenance, no roof penetrations, and often higher annual output.

  • Optimal tilt & azimuth — no compromise with your roof shape
  • Easier service access for cleaning and repairs
  • Great for rural lots, farms and homes with shaded roofs
  • Sun-tracking pole mounts for premium output where space allows
Tell us about your site
GROUND MOUNT
ROOF MOUNT
// WHAT WE INSTALL

From a single panel to a fully off-grid farm.

Every install includes a free site assessment, custom design, and lifetime support from the team that built it.

Residential Solar PV

Grid-tied, hybrid and off-grid systems — roof, ground mount, or pole mount.

Ground-Mount Arrays

Field & yard installs sized for higher-output sites — ideal for ag, rural and larger lots.

Commercial & Ag Solar

Custom systems for businesses, farms and ag operations — REAP-grant eligible.

Kohler Generators

Authorized Kohler installer — 24/7 automatic backup power.

Electrical Install & Repair

Licensed electricians with 32 years of full-service experience.

LED & Energy Monitoring

Smart lighting + live energy monitoring to drive your usage down.

// FREE · NO PRESSURE

Tell us about your site — we'll tell you what's possible.

Six quick questions, a real 25-year estimate, and a free site visit on the calendar.

Where we serve

17 counties across Indiana & Illinois.

Headquartered in Clinton, Indiana, we install solar PV, Kohler generators and full electrical for homes, farms and businesses across Central Indiana and Western Illinois.
